escalation.rationale: Iran warns of regional war expansion while China-Russia defense cooperation deepens amid ongoing US-Israel operations.

ticker_items: Iran threatens war beyond region if US-Israel attacks resume
Chinese military secretly trained 200 Russian personnel for Ukraine
Lithuanian drone alert forces officials into shelters
Israeli strikes kill 19 in southern Lebanon including children
Trump gives Iran 2-3 days for deal as war enters day 82

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrikes killed 19 people including women and children in southern Lebanon.
Israeli airstrikes killed 19 people including women and children

claimed_totals.figure: ~3,468 dead in Iran, ~3,042 dead in Lebanon, 28 in Gulf states

russia.text: Russia Ready to Help Out With U.S.-Iran Talks
russia.speaker: Deputy Foreign Minister
russia.title: Deputy Foreign Minister

russia.text: The countries' ties have reached the highest level in history
russia.speaker: Xi Jinping
russia.title: Chinese President

middle_east.text: Iran can spread war far beyond the Middle East with devastating blows if Israel and US resume attacks
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Revolutionary Guard statement

middle_east.text: Iran had not yet used all the capabilities of the Islamic Revolution against the West
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Revolutionary Guard statement

middle_east.text: Any new attack would prompt retaliation beyond the region
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps

middle_east.text: Iran learned from past clashes as Trump gives Tehran two to three days to reach a deal
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government sources

observers.description: Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops, fighter jet squadron, and Chinese air defense systems to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in early April and enhance Pakistani military presence in the region.

Xi Jinping signed multiple deals with Putin during state visit, reportedly more than Trump secured during his China visit. Chinese tankers exiting Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions signals cautious approach.
Lithuanian officials were moved to safe locations due to drone activity near Belarus border. Residents in Vilnius were ordered to shelters amid heightened tensions on NATO's eastern flank.

financial.notes: US gas prices surge to $4.55 per gallon amid Iran war energy disruption affecting global markets.

update_log.text: Al Jazeera casualty tracker updated with 3,468 dead in Iran, 3,042 in Lebanon
IRGC warns war will extend beyond region if US-Israel aggression repeated
Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon kill 19 including children and women
China secretly trained 200 Russian military personnel according to European intelligence
Trump gives Iran 2-3 days deadline for peace deal as Tehran warns of opening new fronts
Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon kill 19 including women and children
Iran submits formal peace proposal demanding reparations and sanctions lifting
Pentagon reduces Brigade Combat Teams in Europe from four to three
